key_items: Kevin Warsh confirmed as crypto-friendly Fed Chair replacing Powell
CLARITY Act Senate markup vote Thursday with 100+ amendments pending
Bitcoin traders expect fast move to $90K as selling pressure fades
reasoning: Positive regulatory catalysts (Warsh confirmation, CLARITY Act advancement) and institutional adoption trends provide structural support, but short-term macro headwinds (6% US PPI inflation, bond yield stress, $70M whale shorts) create near-term volatility and resistance around $80-81K levels. The next 1-7 days hinge critically on CLARITY Act Thursday markup outcome and whether inflation data stabilizes.
risks: Failed CLARITY Act vote or unfavorable amendments combined with deteriorating macroeconomic data (recession fears, rising bond yields at 1998 levels) could trigger sharp breakdown below $79K support.
